summary: The diff modifies frontend/src/pages/Results.tsx to implement the redesign requested in REQ-142 through REQ-145. The file summary confirms the new layout with all major sections: header, side-by-side tiles, signal banner, 2x2 grid, and ChartOverlay. However, due to truncation, some acceptance criteria cannot be fully verified. Overall, the implementation appears largely complete with one hallucinated feature noted.

hallucinated_features.description: M10 timeframe support (600 seconds duration and '10 min/vela' subtitle) added in Results.tsx
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request only mentions M1, M3, and M5 timeframes in REQ-144 and throughout the requirements. M10 was not requested in any requirement.
